dataset_source: nyu-mll/glue/sst2 train split plus disjoint validation dev/eval slices

privacy_accounting.claim_scope: implementation-level transcript audit for the ZPL release rule; not differential privacy
privacy_accounting.mutual_information_claim_under_zpl_rule: I(S_star; Y_1:T)=0 because every unanimous release is identical for all candidate subsets, and every disagreement release is an independent uniform random sign that never indexes S_star.

privacy_audit.conclusion: PASS: implemented ZPL transcript is independent of S_star by construction

verdict: Reviewer-proof ZPL gate: audits every release for subset-independent transcript construction supporting I(S_star;Y_1:T)=0 under the implemented ZPL rule. Still smaller than full 1000/500/1000 paper scale unless train/dev/eval inputs are increased.
